result:
I’d ensure that every child, everywhere, gets real, high-quality education and basic needs covered (food, safety, healthcare) from birth onward.

Most other big problems—poverty, conflict, climate inaction, extremism, inequity—are much easier to solve when people grow up healthy, literate, numerate, and capable of critical thinking, with some sense of security and dignity. It’s a single lever that changes a lot of downstream outcomes.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
